root_cause.summary: The `docker buildx bake integration-tests` build of moby/buildkit's frontend integration test target failed at build step `#72 [nydus 1/2]`, where `RUN wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz` (Dockerfile:336) hit HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway from github.com and exited with code 1. BuildKit reported `failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget ..." did not complete successfully: exit code: 1`, the buildx bake action emitted `##[error]buildx bake failed with: ...`, and the job exited 1. This is a transient external network failure (github.com 502 from the nydus release CDN), not a Dockerfile or wget bug; the build would succeed on retry once GitHub returns 200.

required_signals.value: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
did not complete successfully: exit code: 1

ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve

evidence_spans.reason: Primary BuildKit failure block: `#72 [nydus 1/2] RUN wget ...` build step header, the connection attempt to github.com, the `wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error` line (the actual root cause), and the `#72 ERROR: process ... exit code: 1` BuildKit error.

Secondary error block + Dockerfile pointer + GHA annotation: BuildKit's re-print of the failing step under `------ > [nydus 1/2] RUN wget ...:`, the `Dockerfile:336` file:line indicator with surrounding source-code context (lines 334-338), the final `ERROR: failed to solve: ...` summary, and the GHA `##[error]buildx bake failed with: ...` annotation that closes the failed step.
